T0022.title: Order Locking
T0022.definition: A homophone for 'order locking.' In e-commerce, when prices drop significantly or coupons are available, fraudsters rapidly place orders without completing payment to hoard inventory, a practice known as order locking.
T0022.description: A homophone for 'order locking.' In e-commerce, when prices drop significantly or coupons are available, fraudsters rapidly place orders without completing payment to hoard inventory, a practice known as order locking.
T0022.usageExample: 别急着付款，先把低价货全部锁单，等价格涨回去咱们再转手卖订单。

references.title: Internet black and gray industry research report in the first half of 2024
